substep.title: Read Structure Doc
substep.action:
Read {{structure_path}} completely. Verify status == "accepted". If not, halt: "code-structure has not been completed (status={{actual_status}}). Run code-structure first; plan consumes a locked structure."
Extract per plan: - Files list (path, purpose, new/modify) - Signatures (one block per file) - Test structure (test files + what they cover) - Slice list (slice N.M → files mapping)

substep.title: Read Linked Design
substep.action: Re-read {{design_path}}. Capture commit-message convention if the design specified one. Capture risk areas for cross- reference during plan drafting.
